description: The Scan LAN button reports an error.
regression_tests: manual UI check: Scan LAN action is hidden on web
root_cause: Same root cause as corner (6235e5ce): _scanForServers() used InternetAddress.anyIPv4 (dart:io) on Flutter Web. client_context.connection.last_status confirmed 'Discovery error: Unsupported operation: InternetAddress.anyIPv4'. Fix added kIsWeb early-return and hid the Scan LAN button on web.
notes: This was the worked example in the bugword skill. Platform macOS:web.
